name: Trike
author: Alek Erickson (2020) / AGP port
description: Trike (Alek Erickson, 2020): an elegant draw-free combinatorial game on a triangle of hexes. Players take turns sliding a single shared neutral pawn in a straight line over empty cells, dropping a stone of their own colour on the landing cell. When the pawn is trapped, whoever owns more stones on the pawn's cell and its neighbours wins. Balanced by a pie (swap) rule.
